raw.message:
Spring is calling! Escape for two nights or more and save up to 15% off.
Book now through May 31, 2026.

hook.summary: Showcase of a luxury hotel room and tropical resort exterior.
hook.visual_action: Pans across a modern hotel room then cuts to a sunny resort pool with palm trees.
hook.text_overlay: I don't need much, but I do need a weekend here

scene_flow: Luxury hotel room interior with modern decor.
Outdoor resort pool area with palm trees and waterfall.
Close-up of a spinning roulette wheel in a casino.
Slot machines displaying multi-million dollar jackpots.
Indoor spa pool and tropical drinks being toasted.
Wide shot of the guitar-shaped hotel building.
on_screen_text: I don't need much, but I do need a weekend here
audience_proxy: Adults 25-55 looking for a luxury vacation or casino gaming experience.
